questions.question: Describe the main differences between the 'Zero-Downtime' and 'Blue-Green' deployment philosophies. Provide an example to illustrate each method. (10 marks)
Which deployment philosophy is most suitable for a high-traffic e-commerce website, considering factors such as scalability and fault-tolerance? Explain your answer with supporting reasons. (8 marks)

What are the advantages and disadvantages of the 'Canary Release' deployment philosophy? How can an organization balance the need for frequent updates with the risk of introducing bugs into production? (15 marks)
